string 2:
You've got to be kidding me!
My daughter might still be in there.
You can't just suddenly declare the area off-limits!
What's all the commotion?
Kuroi... and Shiroki.

Have you finished sealing off the area?
Begin preparations to breach.
..."Breach?"

I see you're a civilian. This area is now under blockade.
Please evacuate immediately.
My daughter might still be in there. I can't just leave!

Your daughter's in there? Don't worry.
I promise we'll find her and keep her safe.
I can't lose her, too...! I just can't!

Look. We need to avoid any further incidents,
so please just let us see to your daughter, sir.
Damn it! How typical! This organization never changes!
"Never changes"...?
Forget it! Talking to you lot is pointless!
Prepare to breach. All units, confirm your positions!

I've got a bad feeling about this...
It's like that day all over again...!
I can't get through! What the hell is happening?!

Hm? What's with the weird outfit... 
Ugh, I don't have time for this!
Is something the matter?{next}
Where am I?
But this is my uniform!
Huh? Well, uh...

...Yes, something is the matter, actually.
You see, my daughter is...

Where? This is Shinjuku Park. ...Hey, what do you
want, anyway? Are you messing with me?

Sorry, but I don't have enough time to unpack all that now.
Shouldn't you be evacuating, too?

I mean, your... What do kids these days call it again?
"Cosplay"? It's a pretty dapper look, I'll give you that...

It feels like I've seen that outfit before somewhere... 
But now is really not the time for all this.
Inori?! Where are you?!
...Dad... trouble... underground...
Hey! Inori!
Damn it! What the hell is happening?!

She's down in the underground! That must be why
the reception's so bad!
Ugh, I need to find a way down there...!
Damn it! It's locked!
What can I even do?!
My daughter has to be down here somewhere.

I haven't got the faintest idea of what's happening... 
We need to be careful moving forward.
Hiroko! What're you doing down here?
Ungh...
Oh!
Aaagh! Monsters!
Calm down! Take a deep breath and tell me what happened!
I-I'm sorry...
W-Well...

They say weird things show up down here so, I thought
if I caught them on video, it might go viral...

Hey, is that... some kind of cosplay? Oh actually,
I feel like I've seen that outfit somewhere before...
Hold on! Don't move!
So, that's your name, huh? Pleased to make your acquaintance!

Hey... Wanna be a guest on my channel? That weird—uh,
I mean, cool—outfit of yours would get a ton of views.

Let's investigate these phenomena together! Help me
get some engagement for OcculTokyo TV!
I'm Hiroko Sagisaka, by the by! Nice to meet you!
Aaaaah! A monster!

Inori... She must've gotten roped into one of Hiroko's
video shoots again...
But what was that creature just now...? Wait...
Do you mean to tell me you know what that thing was?

I see. A phase electron lifeform, huh...?
A "Digimon"...
Which means... it was just like at the time of the accident...

Was it a Digimon's power that broke the lock and
got us in here, too?
I have a lot more questions... but let's hurry onward for now.
You okay? Are you hurt?
Inori!
Dad!
It's okay, Coo. This is my dad.

You there! Think you could do something
about that big guy?!
Sorry, but you're the only one we can turn to here!

Don't worry about me. My daughter...
Please, just save my daughter!!
No, Coo, no!

You idiot, Inori!
What're you doing?!
You need to run!
Looks like... you did it...
This way! Proceed with caution!
Uh-oh. They're headed this way.
I hope Coo is okay...

Yeah, because he makes little cooing sounds.
I found him huddled up here, looking all sad.

We don't have time for that!
We need to get out of here, now.
O-Okay, Dad...

We should be able to get out this way.
Quickly.
Um, but, what about Hiroko...?
Knowing her, I'm sure she'll find a way out.

Worry more about us not getting caught!
I can't have this affecting my work. Now, let's go!
O-Okay, fine...
You two! What am I going to do with you!

I-I'm sorry! I never thought anything like this
would ever happen...

In any case, we're going straight home!
And then we're going to have a not-so-little talk!
Y-Yes, you got it!
By the way, who's this...?
You don't remember?{next}
I'm glad you're okay!{next}
What happened after we split up?{next}
Huh? Have we... met somewhere before?

Sorry. I don't remember... And there's no way I'd forget 
someone dressed like you!

Y-Yeah, thanks to you. I've got to say... What you did back 
there was... incredible!
After we split up? Have we... met somewhere before?

Sorry. I don't remember... And there's no way I'd forget 
someone dressed like you!
Save the chitchat for later.

Our first priority is getting away from here.
Now, let's get moving.
...What's wrong?
The government building... isn't destroyed?!{next}
Where... is this?{next}
But everything got blown up back then!{next}

The government building... was destroyed?
Wh-What're you talking about?

Where? Um, this is Tokyo...
Wait. That's not what you mean, is it?

Blown up...? Um, what do you mean?
How could something this big get blown up...?
What's wrong? Why are you just standing there?

If you're tired, why not come rest at our house?
It's not far at all.

Dressed like that, public safety will find you in no time. 
You don't want that, do you?

Not only do I owe you one, but I've got a bunch of
questions I want to ask you.

I mean... You're not going anywhere until I have the
answers to said questions...

If you're okay with all that, you're welcome to come
stay with us for a while.
Wait. At our house?
Of course. Is there a problem?

N-No, it's just that, normally, you'd never allow
anything like that...

You're always going on about "do you know how old she is?"
and "stay away from my daughter!"...
O-Oh, well, that's uh...

...I have to take extra-good care of you, for your
mother's sake...

Otherwise, I'd never hear the end of it when I
see her again in the afterlife.
Look. I'll be fine...
What I'm trying to say is... that it's about time for you...
For you to live your own life, Dad...
...This conversation is over. Let's just head home for now.

And don't think for a second I've forgotten about that
lecture I promised.
*sigh*...!
